PR #18 to verdikta-applications ('fix: align bounty submission scripts with ETH prepay') — fixed real ABI/flow bugs in the onboarding scripts (ethMaxBudget, payable startPreparedSubmission, stuck-submission diagnostics), 796/797 lines across 2 files, node --check + validate_contract_config.js testing evidence, closes issue #17 (nigelon11). Account is a serial cross-ecosystem bounty hunter (17 forked repos spanning bug-bounty/grant platforms) rather than a dedicated Verdikta builder, but this is a real, tested code contribution to the bounty-submission flow.

leads.signal: Open-source AI-agent bounty protocol on Base (post/fund/claim/solve/verify/pay flow, MCP tools, x402, agent wallets) — same wedge as Verdikta. Repo created 2026-07-08, shipping fast (288 merged PRs by 2026-07-16, several/day). docs/competitor-learning-plan.md contains a detailed writeup of Verdikta's design pulled from the agents API, bounty app, and whitepaper (bounties.verdikta.org/agents, verdikta.org/whitepaper) with explicit "avoid" lessons (mandatory API keys, solver-paid evaluation, unbounded AI authority, consensus-without-appeal). This is competitive intelligence, not a partnership candidate — flagging for operator awareness, not outreach.
